requirement_topic.en: Formaldehyde Emission from Wood-Based Panels — REACH Annex XVII Entry 72
requirement_topic.zh: 木基板材甲醛释放——REACH附件XVII第72条
requirement_topic.zht: 木基板材甲醛釋放——REACH附件XVII第72條

summary.en: Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/1021 introduced Entry 72 into REACH Annex XVII, restricting the placing on the market of wood-based panels (particleboard, MDF, OSB, plywood, and articles incorporating these) where formaldehyde release exceeds 0.062 mg/m³ of air (equivalent to E1 class under EN 13986). Entry 72b applies to articles — including furniture — that incorporate such panels. The limit has applied from 6 August 2023. Testing must follow EN 717-1 (gas analysis method) or EN ISO 12460-5 (flask method with correlation factor). Articles placed on the EU market must not exceed this limit, and economic operators must be able to demonstrate compliance.
summary.zh: 欧盟委员会法规(EU) 2019/1021在REACH附件XVII中新增第72条，限制将甲醛释放量超过0.062 mg/m³空气（相当于EN 13986下E1等级）的木基板材（刨花板、中密度纤维板、定向刨花板、胶合板及含有上述材料的物品）投放市场。第72b款适用于包含此类板材的物品（包括家具）。该限值自2023年8月6日起适用。检测须依据EN 717-1（气体分析法）或EN ISO 12460-5（瓶法，附换算系数）进行。投放欧盟市场的物品不得超过该限值，经营者须能证明合规性。
summary.zht: 歐盟委員會法規(EU) 2019/1021在REACH附件XVII中新增第72條，限制將甲醛釋放量超過0.062 mg/m³空氣（相當於EN 13986下E1等級）的木基板材（刨花板、中密度纖維板、定向刨花板、膠合板及含有上述材料的物品）投放市場。第72b款適用於包含此類板材的物品（包括家具）。該限值自2023年8月6日起適用。檢測須依據EN 717-1（氣體分析法）或EN ISO 12460-5（瓶法，附換算系數）進行。投放歐盟市場的物品不得超過該限值，經營者須能證明合規性。

standards_or_laws: REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006, Annex XVII Entry 72 (as amended by Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/1021)
EN 717-1 — Wood-based panels — Determination of formaldehyde release — Part 1: Formaldehyde emission by the chamber method
EN ISO 12460-5 — Wood-based panels — Determination of formaldehyde release — Part 5: Extraction method (perforator method) with correlation to chamber method
EN 13986 — Wood-based panels for use in construction — Characteristics, evaluation of conformity and marking

summary.en: China's mandatory standard GB 18584-2001 (Limit of harmful substances of wood furniture in indoor decorating and refurbishing materials) sets formaldehyde emission limits for wood furniture using the 40-litre chamber method. The standard specifies E1 class: ≤1.5 mg/L by perforator method, or ≤0.12 mg/m³ by climate chamber method. GB 18584 is a mandatory GB (强制性国标) administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment / SAMR. Note: China's E1 limit (chamber: 0.12 mg/m³) is less stringent than the EU limit (0.062 mg/m³); Chinese-compliant furniture may still fail the EU REACH limit. A revised GB 18584 (GB 18584-2024) has been issued and may apply from 2025 — exporters should verify the current effective date.
summary.zh: 中国强制性国家标准GB 18584-2001（室内装饰装修材料——木家具中有害物质限量）采用40升气候箱法规定木家具甲醛释放限量。该标准规定E1级：穿孔萃取法≤1.5 mg/L，或气候箱法≤0.12 mg/m³。GB 18584为强制性国标，由生态环境部/市场监管总局管理。注意：中国E1限值（气候箱法：0.12 mg/m³）比欧盟限值（0.062 mg/m³）宽松；符合中国标准的家具仍可能不满足欧盟REACH限值。修订版GB 18584-2024已发布，可能自2025年起实施——出口商应核实当前生效日期。
summary.zht: 中國強制性國家標準GB 18584-2001（室內裝飾裝修材料——木家具中有害物質限量）採用40升氣候箱法規定木家具甲醛釋放限量。該標準規定E1級：穿孔萃取法≤1.5 mg/L，或氣候箱法≤0.12 mg/m³。GB 18584為強制性國標，由生態環境部/市場監管總局管理。注意：中國E1限值（氣候箱法：0.12 mg/m³）比歐盟限值（0.062 mg/m³）寬鬆；符合中國標準的家具仍可能不滿足歐盟REACH限值。修訂版GB 18584-2024已發布，可能自2025年起實施——出口商應核實當前生效日期。

standards_or_laws: GB 18584-2001 — Limit of harmful substances of wood furniture in indoor decorating and refurbishing materials (mandatory GB, SAMR/MEE)

gap.en: The EU REACH limit of 0.062 mg/m³ (chamber method) is approximately half of China's 0.12 mg/m³ GB 18584 E1 limit. Furniture manufactured to Chinese E1 class may still exceed the EU REACH threshold. Exporters must obtain EN 717-1 or EN ISO 12460-5 test reports from an accredited EU-recognised laboratory — Chinese GB 18584 test reports to the perforator or Chinese chamber method are not directly equivalent. Testing gap: the test protocols and correction factors differ. Documentation required: test report from EU-accredited lab, traceability to panel batch, economic operator records.
gap.zh: 欧盟REACH限值0.062 mg/m³（气候箱法）约为中国GB 18584 E1限值0.12 mg/m³的一半。按中国E1级生产的家具仍可能超过欧盟REACH阈值。出口商须从欧盟认可的认证实验室取得EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5检测报告——依据穿孔萃取法或中国气候箱法出具的GB 18584检测报告与欧盟要求不直接等同。检测差距：检测方案及换算系数存在差异。所需文件：欧盟认可实验室出具的检测报告、板材批次可追溯性记录及经营者档案。
gap.zht: 歐盟REACH限值0.062 mg/m³（氣候箱法）約為中國GB 18584 E1限值0.12 mg/m³的一半。按中國E1級生產的家具仍可能超過歐盟REACH閾值。出口商須從歐盟認可的認證實驗室取得EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5檢測報告——依據穿孔萃取法或中國氣候箱法出具的GB 18584檢測報告與歐盟要求不直接等同。檢測差距：檢測方案及換算系數存在差異。所需文件：歐盟認可實驗室出具的檢測報告、板材批次可追溯性記錄及經營者檔案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — REACH Annex XVII Entry 72b applies to all furniture articles incorporating wood-based panels placed on the EU market; limit of 0.062 mg/m³ applies from 6 August 2023
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18584-2001 (or revised GB 18584-2024 when effective) is a mandatory national standard for wood furniture sold in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] REACH Annex XVII Entry 72b mandates a formaldehyde release limit of 0.062 mg/m³ for furniture articles incorporating wood-based panels, effective 6 August 2023. This limit is stricter than China's GB 18584 E1 class (0.12 mg/m³). Chinese E1-certified furniture may not meet the EU limit — independent re-testing to EN 717-1 or EN ISO 12460-5 from an EU-accredited laboratory is required before EU market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】REACH附件XVII第72b款规定，含木基板材的家具物品甲醛释放限值为0.062 mg/m³，自2023年8月6日起生效。该限值比中国GB 18584 E1级（0.12 mg/m³）更严格。通过中国E1认证的家具可能不满足欧盟限值——在投放欧盟市场前，须由欧盟认可实验室依据EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5重新独立检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】REACH附件XVII第72b款規定，含木基板材的家具物品甲醛釋放限值為0.062 mg/m³，自2023年8月6日起生效。該限值比中國GB 18584 E1級（0.12 mg/m³）更嚴格。通過中國E1認證的家具可能不滿足歐盟限值——在投放歐盟市場前，須由歐盟認可實驗室依據EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5重新獨立檢測。
